CustomField.description: Include candidates who are exempt from the minimum income requirement (such as voucher holders or other approved exemptions) in the Candidate Pool, even if they do not meet the standard minimum income.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Include candidates who are exempt from the minimum income requirement (such as voucher holders or other approved exemptions) in the Candidate Pool, even if they do not meet the standard minimum income.
CustomField.label: Minimum Income Exemption
